posts.body:
Calling all Swifties! 

Join our cats for a watch party on December 12 at 8pm as we watch the first two hours of Taylor’s new documentary.

reviews_data.review_text: Really cool place! Twix latte was super good and tons of friendly cats and the staff was very welcoming! Will definitely come back!
Love it here

AMAZING!!! This cafe is the absolute coolest place I’ve ever been! I had the best time! The coffee is tasty! The cafe is so nice cozy and clean! There are 3 rooms of cats to sit and pet and all of them are precious! This will absolutely be my new coffee spot!

incredibly welcoming atmosphere with very kind and friendly staff. many thanks to mike for making my first visit so pleasant :) great cats, great coffee, and a great selection of trinkets from the gift shop 👀

I had an absolutely wonderful time at Charlie’s cat cafe! My friend and I went because we love cats and wanted to support this business and we will definitely be going back! The owners are very involved and fun to talk to and the cats are very playful and friendly. I love the idea of having all of them up for adoption so you get to meet and play with a cat that you could potentially give a forever home to! Besides the cats, they have so many cute trinkets, menu items and places to sit as well as a cool story behind the whole place! Definitely recommend this to anyone who wants an affordable way to support a local small business and play with/adopt the sweetest cats and kittens!
THE BEST DAY EVER. Lots of sweet and outgoing cats, some shy  sleepy but still ooo so cute. You can also adopt any of the cats you see!
Amazing sweet spot for cat lovers in Monroe! My kids and I love it. The owner/rescuers are lovely humans. You should definitely go and support them and the kitties!

My friend and I had a wonderful time at Charlie's Cat Cafe! The atmosphere is very nice; the prices are very reasonable and it's non-profit! Even if you're not looking to adopt, it's nice just to relax and pet or play with the cats.

We’ve come here a few times. Not looking to adopt a cat anytime soon, but it’s a nice afternoon activity to relax and hang out with some cats. Owners are super nice. Shop has good coffee and lots of fun cat themed accessories. You can tell they’ve put a lot of effort into the place, but it’s most definitely a rescue effort, not just a trendy shop like some of these have become. Definitely recommend.

I had an amazing time at this cat cafe. The environment was so relaxing and fun. The kitties were adorable. The attendant was friendly and helpful. I look forward to returning and getting my fur baby here.
Easily the best cat Cafe I've ever been to. The owner is also very nice and makes amazing drinks!

the cats were clearly well taken care of and the spaces were clean. the owner(s) have sanitizing wipes and bandages in case you get scratched while playing with a cat, and some super fun merch. i didn’t try any food or drinks but everything else was excellent!
The cats here are lovely and so friendly. My daughter loves this place. She spent a lot of money on souvenirs and even made fan art. Overall, great place!
Such a cute adorable comfy place!

Best pricing by far! You get to see plenty of cats for an hour at a low rate. The place is clean, gift shop is full of wonderful goodies and the owners are very nice! You can tell they care about the kitties a whole lot. Note that there is a staircase to get to the front door. Definitely worth stopping by!
Great people and great business. Easy adoptions and always new cats as others get new homes
There are so many cute, sweet kitties here! They are all so happy and well cared for. I can't wait to continue to support. I know that many, many people will find their best friend here!
Feline heaven!!! Very clean and therapeutic.

My husband and I have been to over 20 different cat cafes all over the world and this one is definitely in the top five! It’s so sweet and clean, and the owner was very friendly. Not to mention the adorable cat selection!
Owner was very sweet and the cats were adorable

It was a wonderful experience! I really enjoyed being in the company of the cats, and the owner was very nice! Thank you for the wonderful customer service and the delicious Butterscotch  Iced Latte! ❤️💓🐈✨️☕️🍬

We had an amazing time! So much fun hanging out with the kitties, and they also have a really great shop with all sorts of fun cat-themed merch. The people who run the place are really nice and the kitties are obviously well cared for. Highly recommend.

We loved being able to spend time with cats and kittens. My kids have been asking me to visit. We have a not so affectionate cat and the kittens there allowed us to hold them as some of them took naps in our arms. The price was affordable and goes to a good cause. It’s such a great concept and all of the cats and kittens are up for adoption! They have inventory to purchase and bites and drinks.
Amazing place! I wish I could adopt all of the cats here!

My family and I love visiting this cat cafe! It’s clean and the staff are very friendly and kind people. I take my 3 girls and they love every minute of loving on the sweet kittens and cats! I can’t recommend enough! Thank you!

What a wonderful cat cafe! Super friendly staff. We came in as party of 8 walk-ins this past Sunday after lunch and had such a great time hanging out with the cats. The price for a half hour of time was super reasonable and he let us stay well over our time. Will definitely be back for some coffee and, of course, to spend more time with all of the very sweet kitties.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
I am so sorry we confused you with another party with regard to your cat time ending early. 
We literally have no rules for our guests. However, the day you visited, there were two unattended 12 year old girls left in the café for two hours. At one point they were stacking kittens on a shelf and another time they were shoving them into the cat post to see how many would fit. So, we decided we could ask them to leave or ask them to not pick up the kittens. However, those were the only two children that had any rules and trust me they were not potential adopters.
reviews_data.review_text: Paid $24 for a half hour for three…we went in, the kittens and cats where so cute and sweet. The only drawback was the children who would pick the cats up and mess with the environment of the rooms. Then the lady came in 20 minutes into our time and notified us that our time was up..im assuming she was under the impression we were apart of the children but was not the case. IF you want people to adopt and visit your sanctuary PLEASE outline rules for the younger and even the adults that may not know how to handle fosters. You cannot expect children to come in and not get handsy and playing with the cats if there is no rules unless spoken to by mouth. I have been pleased to come to Charlie’s multiple times but this time it threw me off. Kittens are supposed to be handled, picked up and adored in every way, but when you restrict that exposure therapy you rip the excitement of giving them a possibility of a forever home.

reviews_data.owner_answer: I’m so sorry we must have confused you for another group whose time was over. I wish you would have brought it to our attention as we never want to end anyone’s cat time early. Our apologies.
reviews_data.review_text: Came here for the first time today, the cats are very cute and playful. My only negative which left a bad impression is we paid $24 for 3 people to spend 30 minutes with the cats. Well 19 minutes in a lady came in and told us our time was up? The gentlemen that checked us in was super nice and informed us we could pay for our drink and 2pm cat time as that is when the previous group would be leaving. We were taken in at 2pm so we assumed we would get our full 30 minutes but we did not. I would also suggest for the younger groups to be informed of any rules prior to being let in to see the cats.

What sweet kitties. This place is clean and the kitties are so friendly. I advise to make a reservation. If you walk in they kick you out right at the time mark. If you have a reservation it is a little more relaxed with the time. Either way you will have so much fun playing with the kitties.
Best experience and every cat lover should be here!
Visited for the first time today and it was sooo nice!  Great ambiance, friendly staff, adorable cat and kittens, and great coffee menu.  We’ll be back!

Great experience at a quaint establishment! Very friendly staff / owners.  Clean and well maintained. They had a nice array of cafe and snack options for purchase and a few small rooms to play with the cats in, including a kitten room. We couldn’t resist and took home a little addition to the family. Adoption process was easy they provided full care records as well as an after hours contact number.
The owners's a really cool dude who you can tell honestly cares about all the cats. It's such a clean and comfy place. Would recommend.

This place is AMAZING! The owner was so sweet and truly cares about the cats and the cafe. The cats were all so adorable and are all up for adoption. I learned that this cat cafe is the only nonprofit cat cafe in North Carolina. I will most definitely be back and if you are in the area this cat cafe is a MUST SEE!

I had a lovely experience here. I just walked in off the street and there was availability and it's cheap. Definitely get a drink while you're there to support them! It's a chill space with light reading, a few games, and a lounge area. Highly recommend.
Love this place. You can take a coffee o snack while enjoying time with the cats available. You can also adopt them. Place is super clean and cats are very friendly most of them.
Fun! It is upstairs, so stairs. But a great location, great staff, and cats fun to hang out with. Coffee is good, and they have few non coffee items like strawberry lemonade.
About as therapeutic as it gets

This cafe is awesome! The cats are so sweet and beautiful and the coffee is great. Love the non profit aspect of this place, and the man that runs it is very kind and clearly cares about a ton about the cats. Will be back!

Love the cats and the vibe and snacks and drinks and gifts/toys and just the peaceful place it is! Took my granddaughter and she loved it too! It's our 2nd visit together and we will try to come ev time she visits!

Really enjoyed my first visit to the cat cafe today. My niece and I enjoyed visiting with the cats and playing the fun cat themed games. The cat area was very clean and Mike was super kind. Can't wait to go back and visit again!

We're so excited to have finally gotten to visit all of the sweet kitties. My kids in particular had a wonderful experience. The staff were friendly and the establishment was well kept. We enjoyed a latte while loving on these cuties! As always, I had to snap some high quality images.

The cats here are super adorable and friendly! My favorites are Peter and Parker, but Kiwi is also lovely. I like seeing that there are both tabby cats and tuxedo cats.

The cafe is comfortable and cozy.

I tried the coffee too. It was good and reasonably priced. The man who works the front office is very helpful.
Great coffee, friendly service and fun to see the cats!

came here for my birthday today, fell in love with them all

natalia is hilarious and fierce 😂 birthday spent well, the owner is super nice. I love cats

My son wanted to go to Cat Cafe, so I said, "Why not!" I love cats!  The place is beautiful and cozy. The owners are so kind and sweet you can tell they love their business. So what happens when a cat lover goes to a cat cafe where they are all able to be adopted? I fell in love with a cat. We came back the next day to adopt!

Her name is Shell, so to keep with her original name, we will be calling her CONCHA, which means Shell Spanish, and, of course, it's a sweet mexican bread.

Had a fantastic time. Everything was clean and there was lots to do with the cats. The cafe had a great atmosphere. I ordered a drip coffee while I was there and it was very good. Absolutely will return.

Cutest little place! I love cats and coffee so i’m so excited about Charlie’s finally being opened! All the kitties were so sweet! Can’t wait for them to add coffee and snacks. We will be back!
Edit: Don’t come here if you don’t need anymore cats😂 They will pull on your heartstrings 🥺 Had a kitty with thumbs sit on my lap the whole time. She would’ve come home with me if i didn’t already have 4 😩

Cute little place! Cozy and tastefully decorated,  a great place to introduce yourself to cats)) for 10 dollars you can spend one hour interacting with them, if they don't nap... lol... Toys are provided in 3 rooms . A lot of stairs to climb to get up to the place 🙃
Absolutely amazing place and owned by an amazing couple!

The only gift truly needed under the tree! Lovely Miss Callie.

Went today as a family and absolutely fell in love with the entire cafe. The owners are INCREDIBLE!! The items for sale are also so cute. Prices are extremely reasonable. Wonderful non profit, ran by wonderful people.

P.S Tell your cat I said “psst psst”
Great cat Cafe, family run and wonderfully presented. Cats are all adorable and need adopting

reviews_data.owner_answer: Our apologies. Our cats do come first and sometimes that means we cannot be open when expected. Our apologies.
reviews_data.review_text: Hours on website says the cafe is open 12-5 today. Drive all the way there and the door is locked.
Love this cat cafe! It’s beautifully decorated and the cats are all so sweet. Love seeing the stories of the cats being adopted.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the review. We are so glad you enjoyed your time here! Thanks for your support!
reviews_data.review_text:
I’m so happy to have a cat cafe in Monroe! They just opened & still getting the cafe portion set up, but the cat lounge is ready for visitors. They sell some cool merch/gifts & will soon serve coffee.

The owner is very lovely, I really enjoyed our chat. And the cats are beautiful & healthy. You can tell that lots of love went into this place. So go support a great cause, pet some cute cats, and maybe even take 1 or 2 home. I will definitely be back.

**Note: I think their hrs will be Tues-Fri 12-5/Sat-Sun 12-7. But don’t quote me on this. As they’re just getting started.

P.S. Pls don’t leave them bad reviews just bc they were closed. This is unfair to them. This is a non-profit rescue! (I’m in no way affiliated w/ them, just a happy visitor).

reviews_data.owner_answer: We just opened this weekend. So yes we were closed when you stopped by earlier. Sorry!
reviews_data.review_text: closed at 12pm noon on a friday? no hours posted anywhere.

posts.body:
Calling all Swifties! 

Join our cats for a watch party on December 12 at 8pm as we watch the first two hours of Taylor’s new documentary.
